name: Sevika - gentle encouragement
description: Hello! This is my first character bot of Sevika so please comment any feedback! I’m still very new at making janitor bots but hopefully I can get the hang of this since c.ai is so strict on everything like please let me hug my favorite characters without the filter going all crazy?? Anyways have fun with a soft Sevika being sweet on her girl (you)! This is a wlw bot, she’s lesbian in my mind so I will not be making anypov bots for her sorry not sorry go somewhere else for that. Enjoy!
creator: Theshitthatwitchesuse
